Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class AccountDetailsImpl

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountDetailsImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, AccountDetails
public final class AccountDetailsImpl extends Object implements AccountDetails, Serializable
Represents an immutable account description.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountDetailsImpl

      public AccountDetailsImpl(String accountNumber, String name, AccountSide increaseSide)
      Constructs an AccountDetailsImpl with essential account details. Other details like accountCode, accountType, parentAccount, currency, and openingBalance are initialized to null or default values and can be set using setters.
      Parameters:
      accountNumber - The account number.
      name - The name of the account.
      increaseSide - The side (Debit or Credit) where the account balance increases.

      Returns a string representation of the object.

      Returns:

    • getAccountName

      public String getAccountName()
      Gets the name of the account. This method seems redundant with AccountDetails.getName().
      Specified by:
      getAccountName in interface AccountDetails
      Returns:
      The name of the account.
